title: Create src/scripts/animations.js with consolidated IntersectionObserver logic
completion_summary: Created src/scripts/animations.js with consolidated IntersectionObserver logic
acceptance_criteria: Single IntersectionObserver for scroll fade-ins with threshold 0.1
Hero section triggers immediately on load (no scroll wait)
Nav link highlighting observer uses rootMargin: '-50% 0px -50% 0px'
prefers-reduced-motion respected: if matched, skips observer and makes everything visible
Uses data-animate='fade-in' on sections and data-nav-section attributes
No new npm dependencies; pure vanilla JS
